auth_access_model: The scaffold expects an API key for most real REST calls via STREAMNET_API_KEY.

discovery_search.note: The current skill lists tables but does not expose a broad search surface.

metadata_schema.note: Table listing and table schema fetch are implemented.

entity_lookup.note: No canonical stock, site, or hatchery identity lookup is exposed.

identifier_crosswalks.note: Cross-system identifier reconciliation is not surfaced.

abundance_assessment.note: Coordinated Assessment records are available through the wrapper.

telemetry_passage.note: This scaffold does not expose telemetry or passage surfaces from StreamNet.

hatchery.note: No hatchery-oriented access path is implemented.

harvest_fishery.note: Harvest and fishery workflows are not implemented.

genetics_gsi.note: Genetics and GSI workflows are not implemented.

package_metadata_export.note: There is no package/export workflow in the current wrapper.

provenance_versioning.note: The API exposes updated filters, but the scaffold does not model full provenance/version contracts.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: The REST surface is machine-readable, but live use is narrow and API-key dependent.

blockers: Live access depends on API credentials.
The wrapper currently covers only a narrow Coordinated Assessment slice.
governance_constraints: Credential-gated access means the agent must distinguish unsupported from unauthorized.
